/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/TreeSimulation.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TreeSimulation.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TreeSimulation.dir/src/tree_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TreeSimulation.dir/include/moc_mainwindow.cpp.o -o TreeSimulation -F/opt/homebrew/Cellar/qt@5/5.15.18/lib  /opt/homebrew/Cellar/qt@5/5.15.18/lib/QtWidgets.framework/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/Cellar/qt@5/5.15.18/lib/QtGui.framework/QtGui /opt/homebrew/Cellar/qt@5/5.15.18/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
